commit.message:
Fix histogram metrics with programmatic MeterFilter instead of YAML property

The YAML percentile-histogram property didn't bind correctly for dotted
meter names. Use a MeterFilter bean to reliably enable histogram buckets
for http.server.requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enable histogram metrics for HTTP requests to populate Grafana p95/p99 panels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add components diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace manual getters/setters with Lombok in Url entity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix off-by-one due date calculation for date-only strings

Date-only strings like "2026-03-08" were parsed as midnight UTC by
new Date(), which is the previous evening in Pacific time. This caused
day counts to be off by one. Added parseDueDate() helper that parses
YYYY-MM-DD strings as local midnight instead.

commit.message:
Fix friend code lookup permission error by querying own sentRequests

hasExistingRequest was reading the other user's friendRequests subcollection,
which Firestore rules correctly block. Now queries the sender's own
sentRequests instead.

fix: frontend Vercel deployment config

- Add frontend/vercel.json — Next.js framework config for Vercel

  caused silent build failures; keep next.config.mjs

with root directory set to "frontend/" and env var:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Apply remaining audit violations to agent/index.html

Security:
- escapeHtml now escapes " and ' — was incomplete for attribute contexts

Code comprehension:
- Document trust boundary in addSimStep: primary/code/annotation are
  authored HTML in SIM_STEPS (intentionally raw); other fields escaped
- Explain tavily_search/search duplication: alias for MCP version variance

Affordance:
- Connector labels now opacity:0.3 by default (was 0) — label existence
  is discoverable; full opacity on hover
- Add cursor:help to .arch-connector — signals hover reveals information

Visual encoding:
- .prop-chip border-radius: 100px → var(--radius-lg) — both disclosure
  trigger types now share the same shape vocabulary
- .arch-node--human: remove border-style:dashed — dashed conventionally
  means placeholder/drop-target, not human actor
- .arch-node:hover: remove translateY(-1px) — elevation implies draggable

Signal-to-noise:
- Remove .header-sep dot and its CSS rule
- Remove 5 HTML section comments that restate class names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add tone-marked pinyin to all Chinese terms on dynasties page

Every Chinese character/term on the page now has explicit pinyin with
tone marks. Covers: dynasty names (h2 headings + timeline), person
names (Qin Shi Huang, Cai Lun, Zhang Heng, Li Bai, Du Fu, Wang Wei,
Xu Ziping, Lai Buyi, Zhang Zeduan, Li Shizhen, Zheng He, Ho Feng-Shan,
Cao Xueqin, Hu Shi, Zhu Cizhao, Meng Sen, etc.), place names (Henan,
Kaifeng, Hangzhou, Yuyao), book/work titles (Xia Xiao Zheng, Shiji,
Shanghan Lun, Bencao Gangmu, Nongshu, Diamond Sutra, Dream of the Red
Chamber), philosophical schools (Rujia, Daojia, Fajia, Yinyangjia),
and specialised terms (jiaguwen, xiazhuan, bingmayong, BaZi, xuanxue,
mafeisan, fengguān, Zhiyanzhai, etc.).

commit.message:
feat: normalizations for try-return, case merge, dedup-let (407/1048, 401/1244)

Add normalize_try_immediate_return: removes try blocks that immediately
return since the catch is unreachable.
Add merge_identical_case_bodies: merges consecutive switch cases with
identical bodies into fallthrough form.
Add dedup_let_declarations: removes duplicate let declarations at the
same brace depth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Track E: Prove decodeFseDistribution_sum_correct — FSE distribution cell count invariant (#619)

* refactor: extract decodeFseDistribution loops into explicit recursion

Replace opaque `while` loops (which desugar to partial `Loop.forIn` and
cannot be unfolded in proofs) with explicit fuel-based recursive functions:
- `pushZeros`: push n zero probabilities respecting maxSymbols
- `decodeZeroRepeats`: inner zero-repeat loop
- `readProbValue`: variable-length probability value reading
- `decodeFseLoop`: main distribution decoding loop

This enables proving the `cellCount` loop invariant needed for
`decodeFseDistribution_sum_correct`. The function signature and
observable behavior are unchanged; all existing tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: prove decodeFseDistribution_sum_correct — FSE cell count invariant

Rewrite decodeFseLoop and decodeFseDistribution without `do` notation
to get clean equation lemmas, then prove the loop invariant:
  remaining + cellCount probs = const
across all iterations.

Key proofs:
- pushZeros_cellCount: pushing zeros preserves cellCount
- decodeZeroRepeats_cellCount: zero-repeat loop preserves cellCount
- decodeFseLoop_invariant: main loop invariant via fuel induction
- decodeFseDistribution_sum_correct: cellCount probs = 1 <<< al

Also fixes decodeFseDistribution_accuracyLog_{ge,le} proofs for the
non-do-notation implementation.

Closes #605

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add anti-scraping protection, admin backup, and server-side logout

Anti-scraping: bot user-agent blocking, stricter rate limits (60/15min)
on 14 public data endpoints, and behavioral IP tracking that temp-blocks
IPs making 40+ data requests in 5 minutes.

Data backup: admin-only POST /api/admin/backup exports all 21 tables as
a downloadable JSON file (excludes password hashes). Button added to
admin panel.

Logout: POST /api/auth/logout revokes tokens via a TokenBlacklist table
with SHA-256 hashed tokens. Both requireAuth and requireAuthRenew check
the blacklist. Frontend logout calls the endpoint before clearing state.

commit.message:
feat: Add reviewer.complete workflow event (#1787)

When a reviewer finishes reviewing a PR, the daemon now emits a
`reviewer.complete` workflow event. This follows the !2003 early-return
pattern: when a workflow script exists, inline nudging effects are
suppressed and the script handles author notification via
rpc.nudge_coworker().

- Add ReviewerComplete variant to WorkflowEvent enum
- Emit the event in review_complete_action_to_effects with
  script-authoritative early return (HandoffToCoworker excluded)
- Handle reviewer.complete in default_workflow.py to nudge the PR author
- Add serialization and accessor tests for the new variant

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
